raw_source.title: Nervos 正在招聘 Developer Support Engineer
raw_source.body:
![](https://files.mdnice.com/user/23171/b49625e3-5cd7-40ef-b493-a8a2388b1d27.png)

## 公司介绍

NERVOS Network 是一个开源的公链生态。我们是一个全球性的团队，在构建开发者和用户社区的同时，我们致力于分布式系统、协议设计、软件工程等交叉领域中一些最令人兴奋的挑战。随着 Nervos 的快速发展，我们正在寻找那些对开放、包容和无许可的未来有着相同愿景的人加入我们的团队，帮助我们建立未来经济基础设施的主干。

对于这个 Developer Support Engineer 的角色，我们希望能找到那些喜欢与其他开发者合作的人--制作和组织 sample content 和资源，识别现有产品和工具中的缺失部分，改善开发者的体验，并与合作伙伴公司合作，帮助推出技术。

在这里，你将获得有竞争力的薪酬和福利，无限的假期政策，高弹性的工作自主性，远程等福利，我们期待你的加入！

## Responsibilities:

- Investigate, research, debug, and solve incidents while working with partners to integrate into Nervos Blockchain
- Plan and build developer demo apps, sample projects, and documentation as required
- Identify key integration opportunities and work with partners on integrations
- Be a technical advisor to Marketing, Business Development, and other non-engineering functions

## Requirements:

- 1+ years of professional experience working with solidity as a blockchain developer
- 3+ years of professional experience as a developer
- Proficient in JavaScript and front end frameworks; Experience in Rust a great plus
- Prior experience in a front-facing engineering role is a strong plus
- Can work at Asian time zone

## Benefits:

- Competitive salary and benefits
- Unlimited vacation policy
- High level of work autonomy
- Live anywhere, work with your own schedule

点击此处申请职位：https://jobs.gohire.io/nervos-network-tzqhh93f/developer-support-engineer-60201/
raw_source.author: Ninicolec
